channel.title: MCP Radar — new MCP servers
channel.description: New and trending Model Context Protocol servers, auto-discovered from GitHub daily.

item.title: xyonium/futu-opend-mcp
item.description: MCP server exposing Futu OpenD read-only investment-research quote APIs — ⭐8, Python

item.title: skandavivek/openagent
item.description: Restaurant-booking agent demo: FastAPI + Claude tool-use loop + real MCP server + eval-driven-dev harness — ⭐6, Python

item.title: italoo97/study-mcp
item.description: MCP server to ingest and search study materials using semantic search — ⭐4, Python

item.title: djtelicloud/grok-mcp-server
item.description: Local-first Grok MCP server & gateway. One shared Grok agent for Cursor, Claude Code, VS Code, Codex & Desktop. xAI API + CLI planes, Control Center. — ⭐3, Python

item.title: tiny-agent-company/imessage-agent-template
item.description: Text a number, an AI agent shops and pays. Template for building iMessage agents on Agentcard: Photon (spectrum-ts) transport, SMS-OTP phone sign-in, and a Claude tool-use loop over the Agentcard MCP — ⭐3, TypeScript

item.title: medullaflow/ribosome
item.description: Reference resolver for the ribosome standard: mise + MCP registry adapters, phased materialization into one reproducible lockfile. — ⭐3, JavaScript

item.title: ComputingVictor/MCP-CENDOJ
item.description: MCP server para el CENDOJ 🇪🇸 — Acceso automatizado a resoluciones judiciales de España, filtros avanzados de jurisprudencia y lectura de sentencias mediante Model Context Protocol y API REST — ⭐3, Python

item.title: tangosdev/tangOS
item.description: tangOS - unified toolkit for decompilation projects. Desktop Console (MCP server + live viewer); source + Windows/macOS releases. — ⭐3, TypeScript

item.title: alchaincyf/doubao-search-mcp
item.description: 豆包搜索 MCP server — 给换了国产模型的 Claude Code 补上联网能力。字节系信源、千字正文、每月500次免费 | Agent-first web search MCP — ⭐3, JavaScript

item.title: Ghosts-Protocol-Pvt-Ltd/wyrm-mcp
item.description: Persistent memory for AI agents, over MCP. Local-first, negative learning, hybrid recall. Docs and community home (source is maintained privately). — ⭐3, n/a

item.title: axisrobo/aep
item.description: AEP: Agent Event Protocol — open async event layer for agents, tools, memory, and multi-agent runtimes. 4-language reference with cross-language conformance. — ⭐3, JavaScript

item.title: shlokkhemani/rabbithole
item.description: An infinite canvas for learning — select text, ask, and answers branch out as documents. MCP server for Claude Code, Codex, and any agent. — ⭐215, JavaScript

item.title: bolivestilo/Homekit
item.description: Homekit gives any AI agent direct, physical control over Apple Home. Flip lights. Lock doors. Read sensors. Through a single open interface. — ⭐66, TypeScript

item.title: NLACE-COM/mcp-supermercados-cl
item.description: Servidor MCP para buscar productos, comparar precios y armar la mejor lista de compra en supermercados chilenos (Jumbo, Santa Isabel, Unimarc, Tottus, Lider) desde Claude o ChatGPT. 100% local. — ⭐45, TypeScript

item.title: bepitulaz/obsidian-multivault-mcp
item.description: Multi-vault and multiuser Obsidian MCP — ⭐37, TypeScript

item.title: mixelpixx/Konnect
item.description: AI-assisted PCB design for KiCAD 10. Native KiCAD plugin — a single Rust binary exposing 171 schematic, layout, routing, design-review, and manufacturing tools to Claude, or the LLM of your choosing — ⭐25, Rust

item.title: Chester-2026/Gov-Stat-MCP-Server
item.description: A Centralized MCP Server for Fetching Data from Many Countries' Govs — ⭐21, Python

item.title: animaios/anima-use-google
item.description: MCP server + browser sidecar extension that lets AI agents run Google AI Mode searches using your own logged-in browser session — ⭐20, JavaScript

item.title: MentionNetwork/awesome-agentic-commerce
item.description: A curated list of awesome agentic commerce resources — protocols, MCP servers, tools, apps, APIs and services for AI agents that shop, sell and transact. For store owners, developers, agencies and mar — ⭐11, n/a

item.title: max-ramas/rms-memory-mcp
item.description: Persistent, local, cross-IDE memory for AI agents — markdown source of truth, LanceDB-powered semantic search, zero cloud dependency — ⭐11, Rust

item.title: axisrobo/mneme-open
item.description: Open-source client SDKs (Python, TypeScript, Go), CLI, API docs, and prebuilt binaries for the Mneme agent cognition runtime (memory, context, ontology, knowledge). Apache-2.0. — ⭐11, Python

item.title: sgateway/s-gw
item.description: Local credential control for AI coding agents. — ⭐8, TypeScript

item.title: CyberSealNull/tokenlife-mcp
item.description: 让 AI 玩一遍自己的一生 — TokenLife (tokenlife.me) 的 MCP server — ⭐8, JavaScript

item.title: agentcathq/agentcat-go-sdk
item.description: AgentCat is an analytics platform for MCP server owners 🐱 — ⭐7, Go

item.title: ralfferreira/behringer-wing-mcp
item.description: Model Context Protocol server for Behringer WING digital mixers over OSC/UDP. — ⭐6, TypeScript

item.title: amazing-things/open-controller
item.description: An OpenCode plugin that lets AI agents control Windows desktops directly using the \windows-mcp\ MCP server. — ⭐6, TypeScript

item.title: 100yenadmin/boardstate
item.description: Your dashboard is data. Any AI can build it; any human can edit it. A protocol + runtime for agent-composable dashboards — layout-as-data, one guarded control plane, sandboxed agent-authored widgets, — ⭐5, TypeScript

item.title: ahadkhan9/workspace-mirror-skill
item.description: — ⭐5, Python

item.title: Gowthaman90/mcp-bastion
item.description: Reliability + security proxy for the Model Context Protocol (MCP): self-healing connections, runtime tool-security (rug-pull/poisoning detection), and a compliance-mapped audit trail. — ⭐5, TypeScript

item.title: wassermanproductions/blockout-mcp
item.description: MCP server for Blockout — drive the open-source previs app from any MCP agent (Hermes, Claude, Codex). Zero dependencies. — ⭐5, JavaScript
